mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tenant_auto_renew_request (tenant_id, expiration_snapshot, status, created_at, updated_at) SELECT t.id, t.expiration_date, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM tenant t WHERE t.expiration_date IS NOT NULL AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND DATEDIFF(t.expiration_date, CURDATE()) <= #{windowDays} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tenant_auto_renew_request r WHERE r.tenant_id = t.id AND r.expiration_snapshot = t.expiration_date )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS requestId, r.status AS status, r.period AS period, r.price AS price, r.new_expiration_date AS newExpirationDate, r.processed_by AS processedBy, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.expiration_snapshot AS expirationDate, t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS companyCode FROM tenant_auto_renew_request r INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id = r.tenant_id WHERE r.id = #{requestId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_auto_renew_request SET status = 'approved', new_expiration_date = #{newExpirationDate}, processed_by = #{processedBy}, processed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
UPDATE tenant SET expiration_date = #{newExpirationDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE tenant_auto_renew_request SET status = 'rejected', processed_by = #{processedBy}, processed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
UPDATE tenant_auto_renew_request SET period = #{period}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
